title: Describe a scene and invent a story
subtitle: Use visible clues to create a plausible narrative.
duolingoBridge: B1 Med trains native-style but level-appropriate French: natural chunks, connected answers, listening strategy, and practical output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: describe what you can see.
Knowledge point 2: make careful guesses with peut-être and on dirait que.

items.fr: Au premier plan, on voit une femme qui attend devant une gare.
items.en: In the foreground, we see a woman waiting in front of a station.
items.es: En primer plano, se ve a una mujer que espera delante de una estación.

items.fr: Au fond, il y a plusieurs personnes qui marchent rapidement.
items.en: In the background, there are several people walking quickly.
items.es: Al fondo, hay varias personas que caminan rápido.

items.fr: On dirait qu’elle vient de manquer son train.
items.en: It looks like she has just missed her train.
items.es: Parece que acaba de perder su tren.

items.fr: Peut-être qu’elle appelle un ami pour expliquer son retard.
items.en: Maybe she is calling a friend to explain her delay.
items.es: Quizás llama a un amigo para explicar su retraso.

items.fr: J’imagine que cette situation la stresse, mais qu’elle va trouver une solution.
items.en: I imagine that this situation stresses her, but that she will find a solution.
items.es: Imagino que esta situación la estresa, pero que encontrará una solución.
